mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement - where overdraft fees are a thing of the past! Sign up now and enjoy VIP treatment for life!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my favorite upscale restaurant, ready to indulge in a lavish meal fit for a CEO like myself. As I confidently slid into my usual corner booth, I noticed the waiter approaching with a menu in hand. But instead of the usual warm greeting, he had the audacity to ask if I had a reservation. A reservation?! Me, the illustrious Hot Josh, a man of influence and power, being questioned about a reservation in my own establishment?Feigning shock, I threw my arms up dramatically and declared, "Do you not know who I am? I am Hot Josh, the CEO of Bank of Entitlement, and I demand immediate seating without question!" The waiter, clearly flustered by my display of entitlement, scrambled to find me a table, apologizing profusely for the misunderstanding.As I sat down, I relished in the satisfaction of asserting my dominance and superiority in that moment. My over-the-top reaction had not only secured me a prime dining spot but also reaffirmed my rightful place at the top of the social hierarchy. Who needs a reservation when you have the power of entitlement on your side? And thus, I dined like a king that evening, knowing that my entitlement always prevails in the end.
